div.p: Objective: Transform on-disk DirEntry records into Kernel-compatible Dirents via the filler() callback. Implementation: FUSE-M5 / Linux VFS Interop

g.text: Daemon locks g_fuse and calls path_resolve()
Iterates through all blocks defined in inode pointers
Skips entries where inode == 0. Offset incremented by rec_len.
Daemon constructs minimal stat structure for filler
